executives.name: Andrew Bonfield
executives.background: Andrew Bonfield is chief financial officer of Caterpillar Inc. Before joining Caterpillar in 2018, he served as CFO of National Grid plc and held senior finance roles at Cadbury plc, Bristol-Myers Squibb, and SmithKline Beecham.

tenure_dates.title: Group Chief Financial Officer / Board Member

executives.name: Badar Khan
executives.background: Badar Khan has served as our Chief Executive Officer since November 2023. Prior to joining EVgo, Mr. Khan served as President of National Grid US from 2019 to 2022. He also served as a member of the National Grid plc executive committee. Prior to National Grid, Mr. Khan worked at Centrica plc for 14 years, including as Chief Executive Officer of Direct Energy.

executives.name: Dean Seavers
executives.background: Former President and Executive Director of National Grid plc.

tenure_dates.title: President of National Grid U.S. / Executive Director

executives.name: Martha Wyrsch
executives.background: Ms. Wyrsch was formerly the General Counsel of Sempra Energy. She has extensive legal and regulatory experience in the energy sector.
